ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s integration with major platforms and new investment vehicles. Recent funding and infrastructure updates are drawing focus from both institutional and developer communities.
ctxTalking:
• Meta is now offering USDC creator payouts directly to crypto wallets on Solana and Polygon.
• Solana Ventures led an $18 million round in Squads to expand its stablecoin platform, Altitude.
• The Crypto Core3 ETF, which includes Solana, is being positioned as a simple entry point for mainstream investors.
ctxMatters:
Meta’s move could increase USDC transaction volume and wallet adoption on Solana.  
The Squads funding signals continued growth in Solana-based stablecoin infrastructure.  
Inclusion in the Crypto Core3 ETF may broaden Solana’s exposure to traditional investors.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Meta’s USDC payouts and the Squads funding round show active ecosystem expansion.  
Noise: General speculation about ETF impacts without clear Solana-specific data.
ctxGlossary:
USDC — A widely used stablecoin pegged to the US dollar.  
Multisig protocol — A system requiring multiple approvals for transactions, enhancing security.  
ETF — Exchange-traded fund, a basket of assets traded on traditional markets.

readMore.title: Meta begins offering USDC creator payouts to crypto wallets on Solana and Polygon blockchains
GSR says Crypto Core3 ETF is simple gateway for mainstream investors
